decisions.detail: Drift corrected: 5 Shorts were stale SCHEDULED in state but verified PUBLIC via YouTube oEmbed (HTTP 200) — v2_twist(vxP6XiJKLkg, 06-05), v2_answer(TwJNypz8c4I, 06-06), v3_hook(5e8ELVo5ARg, 06-08), v3_twist(0eDPVcgODvY, 06-10), v3_answer(y3xLIfOAPHA, 06-12). Set status=PUBLIC + actual_published_at=scheduled_at for each. Cross-checked: live voidline Studio session sitting on 5e8ELVo5ARg analytics period-since_publish.

Pipeline empty: no Shorts scheduled for next 3 days (Sun 06-14, Mon 06-15, Tue 06-16). Catalogue queue is dry beyond v3_answer (06-12) — the entire v3 Tunguska batch is now published with nothing staged behind it. Cadence target is 5 Shorts/wk (Mon/Wed/Fri/Sun) so 06-14 + 06-15 slots are already unfilled. ACTION NEEDED: render+schedule next batch (v4 topic). Also: tomorrow Sun 06-14 17:00 UTC is a long-form + Reddit-seed day per cadence, but no long-form appears scheduled — verify in tomorrow's run.

Runner logged 'no notable delta' (false negative: diffs only the two most recent snapshots, 18s apart, both blank-crippled). Manual baseline diff (vs 06-13): v1_bonus_briggs PUBLIC at 319v — first Short past 300v, clears the ~279-298v narrative/question ceiling (the bonus built to break the plateau worked). Long-forms waking: v3_Tunguska 35v (was 0/suppressed), v1_MaryCeleste 18v (was 2v). All confirmed PUBLIC via oEmbed 200.
State drift: v1_bonus_briggs(vZ68HlWfT-Q) was SCHEDULED(06-15) in shorts_state.json but live (oEmbed 200, 319v). Set status=PUBLIC + actual_published_at=2026-06-15T12:00:00Z.

voidline session alive, 136 cookies restored, no login wall/CF. auth_check reports 'dead' but that is posting-specific; read-only renders fine. Reach metric cards are shadow-DOM/canvas behind a modal overlay so extract_text only returned page chrome — impressions/CTR/traffic NOT captured this run. Studio actions used: 1 navigate + 1 wait + 2 extracts (within 5-action budget).
